title: Embedding monday workflows in boards
excerpt:
The ability to integrate/embedd workflows into a monday board template.

I really love the capabilities of Monday.com workflows, but one thing I can’t get past is the limitation in configuring workflows and templates. I…

posts.author: Tobias.Kahr (Tobias Kahr)
posts.cookedHtml:
• The ability to integrate/embedd workflows into a monday board template.

I really love the capabilities of Monday.com workflows, but one thing I can’t get past is the limitation in configuring workflows and templates. I would love the ability to integrate a workflow into a template so that when I generate a template, it automatically connects with the configured Monday workflow. This would help with the creation of recurring boards that need to be set up with a specific workflow.

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: YES! Not including the workflow when creating boards from a template is a real hassle, I would love to see this ability.
